column2: p <- ggplot(y_freq, aes(x = hour, y = scheduled_departures,
color = day_type, group = day_type, text = hover)) +
# ribbons (explicit x + ymin/ymax; fixed fill so they don't control legend)
aes(x = hour, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
aes(x = hour, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
annotate("text", x = rush_lines, y = max(df$hi, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.96,
title = "Yamanote — Rush Hour 2025-2026 (scheduled departures by hour)",
subtitle = paste0("Reference station: ", ref_stop, " • Shaded band is a visual range (schedule-based)"),
xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE),
yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE)
config(displayModeBar = FALSE, scrollZoom = FALSE, doubleClick = FALSE)
